title: Optimal Scary!
description: This is a modpack that is centered around optimization. This modpack also has minimal "Fun" mods that improve the experience while still keeping good frames.
body:
## Have you ever wanted to play Minecraft in the dark with your friends?

Well I do however I do not have any friends.

---

### If you have friends or you just want an optimized game, this mod pack is for you.

 From the massive performance boost that these mods give to you to the horrors of the darkness, this mod pack gives you everything. Have you ever wanted to easily transfer a lot of items throughout containers? The mouse wheely mod is for you. Have you ever wanted to play Minecraft with your friends? The mod "em4c" lets you run a server on your machine for others to connect to. The "Simple Voice Chat" mod adds fun ways to connect with your friends. 

---

### At the very center there is the "True Darkness" mod.

 The lack of light is terrifying. ***Is there a mob in front of me?*** You can hear the sounds of your feet on the ground. You can hear the reverberations of you walking, breaking blocks, and eating. Without a torch, you are blind.

![A light lantern lighting up the pitch black forest](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/sbLtjppC/images/e2592a130db6c2e2d492d945c5129ed36697d437.png 'Alone')

<details>
<summary>List of mods</summary>

- Continuity
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- More Culling
- ImmediatelyFast
- Do a Barrel Roll
- Default Dark Mode
- More Chat History
- Simple Voice Chat
- MinecraftCapes
- Cloth Config API
- Sodium
- Reese's Sodium Options
- FPS - Display
- AppleSkin
- Cull Leaves
- Starlight (Fabric)
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- True Darkness
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- Xaero's World Map
- Indium
- Fabric API
- Sodium Extra
- Drip Sounds (Fabric)
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
- Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)
- Iris Shaders
- Mouse Tweaks
- Lithium
- LazyDFU
- FPS Reducer
- Better Mount HUD
- Architectury API
- Mod Menu
- ModernFix
- e4mc
- No Chat Reports
- Presence Footsteps
- FerriteCore
- ThreadTweak
- Zoomify
- Very Many Players (Fabric)
- FastQuit
- LambDynamicLights
- Lighty
- Sound Physics

It might be a lot, but it does work.

</details>
